Pre-Launch Email Sequence

Email sequence for T-7 days through launch - VIP, B2B, and B2C segments

Pre-Launch Email Sequence

Segmentation Strategy

  • VIP List: Early supporters, beta testers, referrals, property manager contacts
  • Main List: General interest signups, website visitors, waitlist members
  • B2B Segment: Property managers, hospitality operators (industry-specific copy)
  • B2C Segment: Homeowners, smart home enthusiasts (consumer-focused copy)

EMAIL 1: Launch Announcement (T-7 days, 8:00 AM PT)

Email 1A: VIP List (B2C Focus)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: We’re launching February 15th (VIP early access for you)
Subject B: You’re getting first access to HeyZack next week
Preheader: One hour before everyone else + 40% early bird discount

Body:

Hey [First Name],

I’m writing to you first because you’ve been following our journey, and you deserve to know before anyone else:

HeyZack launches on Kickstarter February 15th at 9:00 AM PT.

But here’s what matters to you: As a VIP, you get access one hour early (8:00 AM PT) to secure the best early bird pricing before it’s gone.

What You’ll Get Access To:

✓ Early Bird Starter Kit: $799 (40% off retail $1,332)
✓ Limited to first 500 backers — after that, price increases
✓ First shipments in June 2026 (VIPs ship first)
✓ One app controls everything — cameras, locks, climate, lighting
✓ No monthly fees for core features
✓ 30-minute setup (we’ve timed it)

Why This Matters:

Remember all those frustrations we talked about? Seven different apps. Automations that break after updates. Smart homes that aren’t actually smart?

We solved it.

Tyler (our beta tester from Seattle) said it best: “I’ve rebuilt my smart home three times in five years. HeyZack is the first system that actually just works. My wife uses it daily without asking me for help—that’s how I know it’s good.”

Preview the Campaign (Live Now):

I’ve activated a private preview link just for VIPs. You can see the full campaign page, pricing, all the details—and leave questions in the comments.

👉 See Your VIP Preview

Quick heads-up: Only 500 early bird spots available. Last time we tested pre-launch interest, we had 2,400 signups. First-come, first-served.

Set your alarm for February 15th, 8:00 AM PT (that’s your VIP hour).

See you on launch day,

— Alex Chen
CEO & Co-Founder, HeyZack

P.S. — Forward this to anyone who’s complained about their smart home. They’ll thank you when their house actually works.

[BUTTON CTA: Preview the Campaign]

Email 1B: VIP List (B2B Focus)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: HeyZack launches Feb 15th (Early operator access)
Subject B: Portfolio-scale automation—launching next week
Preheader: Commercial beta program + 60% early adopter discount

Body:

Hey [First Name],

Quick update for property operators who’ve been following our development:

HeyZack launches on Kickstarter February 15th at 9:00 AM PT.

Your early operator access goes live one hour before public launch (8:00 AM PT). Here’s why that matters:

Commercial Beta Program (Limited to 200 Operators):

Essential Tier: $4,999/property (60% off $8,000 retail)

  • Portfolio dashboard (unlimited properties)
  • AI energy optimization (20-30% savings documented)
  • Tenant/guest automation (check-in, climate, access)
  • DIY deployment (2 hours per property avg.)
  • Zero service contracts

What We’re Proving:

Patricia (property manager, 28-building portfolio in Austin) deployed HeyZack across 12 properties in Q4 2025:

  • Energy costs down 28% in Q1 = $47K saved
  • Tenant comfort complaints down 65%
  • Deployment cost: $5K per building vs. $85K quotes from Honeywell
  • ROI: 6 months

She’s adding her remaining 16 buildings this quarter.

Preview Access (Active Now):

I’ve set up a private operator preview with the full campaign, pricing tiers, technical specs, and beta case studies.

👉 View Operator Preview

Fair warning: We’re capping the commercial beta at 200 operators to ensure deployment support quality. With 400+ operators on our waitlist, first-come basis applies.

Mark your calendar: February 15th, 8:00 AM PT (your early access window).

Talk soon,

— Alex Chen
CEO & Co-Founder, HeyZack

P.S. — If you’re evaluating BMS vendors right now, see the preview before you sign any contracts. The cost difference will shock you.

[BUTTON CTA: View Operator Preview]

Email 1C: Main List (B2C Focus)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: HeyZack launches February 15th →
Subject B: The smart home that finally just works—launching next week
Preheader: One app for everything. No monthly fees. 30-minute setup.

Body:

Hey [First Name],

Remember signing up because you were tired of juggling seven different apps just to control your smart home?

HeyZack launches February 15th at 9:00 AM PT on Kickstarter.

Here’s what that means for you:

Early Bird Pricing (Limited Quantity):

Smart Home Starter Kit: $799 (retail: $1,332)
Includes:

  • Central hub + 2 cameras + 4 sensors + 2 smart switches + thermostat integration
  • One app controls everything
  • AI learns your habits (no programming)
  • 15-30% energy savings guaranteed
  • No monthly fees

Only 500 early bird spots. After that, price increases to $999.

The Difference You’ll Feel:

Emma (beta tester, mother of 3 in Portland) put it this way:

“I was spending $210/month on electricity and constantly nagging my kids about lights. HeyZack automated everything—now it’s $163/month, I’m not the energy police anymore, and my family doesn’t resent me. Setup took 35 minutes. This is what smart homes should have been from day one.”

See It Before Launch:

We’ve opened a preview link so you can see the full campaign, all the details, pricing, and FAQ—before the public launch.

👉 Preview the Campaign

One quick note: With 2,400+ people on our waitlist and only 500 early bird spots, these will go fast. Set a reminder for February 15th, 9:00 AM PT so you don’t miss out.

See you on launch day,

— Alex
Founder, HeyZack

P.S. — Your non-tech partner will actually like this one. Promise.

[BUTTON CTA: Preview the Campaign]

EMAIL 2: Launch Reminder (T-1 day, 8:00 AM PT)

Email 2A: VIP List (B2C Focus)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Tomorrow at 8 AM: Your VIP hour starts
Subject B: You’re one of 500 getting early access tomorrow
Preheader: Set your alarm—early bird pricing sells out fast

Body:

Hey [First Name],

This is it.

Tomorrow (February 15th) at 8:00 AM PT, your VIP early access window opens.

You’ll have one hour before the public to secure:

✓ Early Bird Starter Kit: $799 (40% off retail)
✓ Limited to first 500 backers
✓ First shipments (June 2026)
✓ Founding member benefits (priority support, future beta access)

What Happens Tomorrow:

8:00 AM PT — VIP access goes live (that’s you)
9:00 AM PT — Public launch (remaining 1,900+ waitlist members)
~10:30 AM PT — Early bird tier likely sold out (based on our waitlist math)

Set Your Alarm:

Seriously. Set a phone alarm for 8:00 AM PT tomorrow.

We have 500 early bird units. We have 2,400+ people on the waitlist. First-come, first-served.

Your Private Preview Link:

Want to review the campaign one more time before tomorrow? Your preview link is still active:

👉 Review Campaign Details

See you in the morning,

— Alex

P.S. — If you can’t make 8 AM, you’ll still have access at 9 AM with the public launch—but early bird pricing may be gone by then.

[BUTTON CTA: Set My Reminder] (Links to calendar invite download)

Email 2B: VIP List (B2B Focus)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Tomorrow 8 AM: Operator early access opens
Subject B: 200 beta slots available—tomorrow morning
Preheader: Commercial beta program opens in 24 hours

Body:

[First Name],

Quick reminder for operators:

Tomorrow (February 15th) at 8:00 AM PT, commercial beta program opens.

Essential Tier: $4,999/property (60% off $8,000 retail)
Professional Tier: $3,999/property (60% off $6,500 retail)

Limited to 200 operators total.

Timeline Tomorrow:

8:00 AM PT — Operator early access (you)
9:00 AM PT — Public launch
~11:00 AM PT — Commercial beta slots likely filled (400+ operators on waitlist)

Why This Matters:

The commercial beta isn’t just about pricing—it’s about deployment support. We’re capping at 200 operators so we can provide:

  • White-glove onboarding calls
  • Custom deployment roadmaps for your portfolio
  • Direct access to our solutions architects
  • Priority feature requests

Once we hit 200, the next cohort won’t open until Q3 2026 at higher pricing.

Review Before Tomorrow:

Your operator preview link is still active:

👉 Review Program Details

Talk tomorrow,

— Alex Chen
CEO, HeyZack

P.S. — Forwarding this to your operations team? They should register separately at the preview link to get their own early access notification.

[BUTTON CTA: Add to Calendar]

Email 2C: Main List (B2C Focus)

From: Alex Chen at HeyZack
Subject A: Tomorrow 9 AM: HeyZack launches
Subject B: 24 hours until early bird pricing goes live
Preheader: 500 early bird spots, 2,400 people waiting—set your alarm

Body:

[First Name],

Tomorrow morning. 9:00 AM PT.

HeyZack launches on Kickstarter.

Early Bird Starter Kit: $799 (retail: $1,332)
Only 500 available at this price.

After 500, price increases to $999. After 1,000, it goes to $1,199.

The Math:

  • 2,400+ people on waitlist
  • 500 early bird spots
  • First-come, first-served

Set an alarm. Seriously.

Quick Reminder of What You’re Getting:

✓ One app controls everything (no more app-juggling)
✓ AI that actually learns (not just timers)
✓ 15-30% energy savings (average $47/month)
✓ No monthly fees
✓ 30-minute setup
✓ Ships June 2026

Review Before Tomorrow:

Preview link is still active if you want to review details one more time:

👉 Preview Campaign

See you in the morning,

— Alex

P.S. — Can’t make 9 AM? No worries—campaign runs through March 30th. But early bird pricing will definitely be gone by afternoon.

[BUTTON CTA: Set Alarm for 9 AM PT] (Links to calendar invite)
